theme_strategy.description: A serious, trustworthy 'command centre' aesthetic for law enforcement (Dark mode), contrasted with an approachable, safe off-white theme for citizens (Light mode). Combines high-density dashboard layouts with cinematic, glowing focal points for risk markers.
theme_strategy.archetype: ARCHETYPE 4: SWISS & HIGH-CONTRAST mixed with COMMAND CENTER TACTICAL

rules: Use Manrope for all headings with tracking-tight (-0.02em to -0.04em).
Use Inter for body text and dense data tables.
Headings should not exceed text-5xl on desktop (fluid scaling).
Labels and overlines must be Uppercase, tracking-widest, and text-xs.

surfaces_and_shapes.radii: rounded-xl for cards, rounded-full for buttons/pills.
surfaces_and_shapes.glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl combined with surface_glass color and 1px inner border. Use heavily on sticky navbars and detail drawers.
surfaces_and_shapes.shadows: Subtle ambient shadows in Light Mode. In Dark Mode, replace soft drop shadows with 'inner glow' borders (e.g., ring-1 ring-white/10).
surfaces_and_shapes.cards: Card-based layout. Use 1px subtle borders. Do not use fully transparent cards if content is under them.

layouts_and_grids.dashboard_grid: High Density Grid. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 or 12-col bento. Tight gaps (gap-4 or gap-6). Cards must use h-full to match neighbors.
layouts_and_grids.citizen_grid: Tetris Grid. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12. Generous padding (p-8 to p-12). Asymmetrical overlapping for landing page.

components_strategy.navbar: Glassmorphism header with z-50. Include role-switcher dropdown (Citizen / Officer / Command Centre).
components_strategy.chat_interface: Citizen Fraud Shield: Friendly rounded-2xl message bubbles. AI risk verdict card uses Manrope font and semantic colors. EN/HI toggle pill.
components_strategy.scam_analyzer: Officer View: Two-column layout. Transcript on left, inline highlights with bg-danger/20 or bg-warning/20. MHA Draft Panel on right.
components_strategy.network_graph: Use react-force-graph-2d or react-force-graph-3d. Nodes colored by risk level. Panel overlay for cluster details.
components_strategy.geospatial_map: Leaflet + OSM with Dark tile layer (CartoDB Dark Matter). Glowing pulsating markers (using CSS ping animation) for high-risk red zones.
components_strategy.alerts_feed: Live toast feed every 20s. Use Sonner library positioned at bottom-right.
components_strategy.status_pills: Use flex, items-center, gap-2, rounded-full, px-3, py-1, text-xs, font-medium.

animations: Pulsing glow on high-risk markers: animate-pulse combined with drop-shadow-[0_0_8px_rgba(239,68,68,0.8)].
Skeleton loaders: animate-pulse on rounded-xl slate-800 blocks (minimum 1-2s delay for realism).
Animated verdict reveals: Framer Motion slide-up and fade-in.
visual_enhancers.textures: In Command Centre, apply a subtle CSS noise overlay (opacity 2-3%) to kill digital flatness.

hero_scam_background.description: Scammer in dark room. Use for Citizen landing page risk-awareness section with a heavy dark gradient overlay.

city_map_dark.description: Dark mode city aerial. Can be used as a background or placeholder for map section.

currency_sample.description: Indian currency note for the Counterfeit Identification Agent view.

network_graph_bg.description: Data visualization background if a fallback is needed before rendering canvas graph.

officer_avatar.description: Law enforcement officer avatar / profile picture.

testing.attributes: All interactive elements (buttons, nav items, dropdowns) MUST include 'data-testid' in kebab-case format.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use 'lucide-react' for all icons.
Implement a robust 'dark' class toggling strategy on the root element. Officer/Command is strictly Dark Mode, Citizen is strictly Light Mode.
For the Force Network Graph, consider 'react-force-graph-2d' to maintain performance, or 'recharts' if building static data views.
For Leaflet, use 'react-leaflet' and apply a dark tile provider (e.g., CartoDB Dark Matter).
Avoid standard Bootstrap/Tailwind centered layouts. Keep forms and headers left-aligned.
For buttons, use pill-shaped (rounded-full) or completely rounded-xl corners with smooth transitions, no default shadow.
Do NOT use 'transition: all'. Explicitly define transition properties (e.g., transition-colors, transition-transform).
Ensure 'Inter' is NOT used for headings. Stick to 'Manrope' for H1-H4.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid this.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style.
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, entrance animations.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Main agent relies on provided image URLs. Missing categories = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN.
